src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Define a bean for ClientRegistrationRepository to support OAuth2 client registration features, using a custom JDBC-based implementation.
Replace manual SimpleCacheManager with Spring's CaffeineCacheManager to leverage built-in cache registration and configuration features.
Explicitly disable null values in the cache manager to prevent potential runtime issues or unexpected behavior with null entries.
Add logic to handle cache entries with zero or negative TTL by omitting expiration settings, ensuring valid Caffeine configuration.
Replace string-based charset encoding with StandardCharsets.UTF_8 to remove checked exception handling.
Switch from string concatenation to placeholder-based logging for better performance and readability.
Capture and store client_id in login history for better audit trails.
Replace explicit cast after instanceof check with Java 16+ pattern matching for cleaner code.
Replace Apache Commons StringUtils.equalsIgnoreCase with org.apache.commons.lang3.Strings.CI.equals for case-insensitive comparison.
Remove manual null check for loadUserByUsername result, relying on Spring Security's internal exception handling for null returns.
Remove debug log statements for authentication failures, likely to reduce noise or rely on exception stack traces.

Remove the custom AuthenticationProvider bean definition which is no longer referenced in the security configuration.
Add @Order annotation to the SecurityFilterChain bean to explicitly control its precedence relative to other security configurations.
Extract the authentication success handler logic into a private method for cleaner configuration code.
